source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 giu3 zou6
cards.english: My name is Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: ji4 keoi5 zau6 hai6 ngo5 sai3 lou2
cards.english: And this is my younger brother George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 zau6 hai6 zyu1 taai3 taai2
cards.english: This is Mrs. Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 hai6 zyu1 sin1 saang1
cards.english: This is Mr. Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6
cards.english: I'm Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: ng5 caan1
cards.english: [Lunch]

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.characters: Peppa同George嚟到 豬爺爺同埋豬嫲嫲嘅屋企食午餐
cards.jyutping: tung4 lai4 dou3 zyu1 je4 je4 tung4 maai4 zyu1 maa4 maa4 ge3 uk1 kei2 sik6 ng5 caan1
cards.english: Peppa and George have come to Grandpa Pig and Grandma Pig's house for lunch.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: maa4 maa4 nei5 hou2
cards.english: Grandma, hello.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: maa4 maa4 hou2
cards.english: Grandma, hello.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.characters: 我可愛嘅孫仔，你哋好嗎？
cards.jyutping: ngo5 ho2 oi3 ge3 syun1 zai2 nei5 dei6 hou2 maa1
cards.english: My cute grandsons, how are you?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.characters: 你哋想唔想喺花園度摘啲菜做午餐啊？
cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 soeng2 m4 soeng2 hai2 faa1 jyun4 dou6 zaak6 di1 coi3 zou6 ng5 caan1 aa3
cards.english: Do you want to pick some vegetables in the garden for lunch?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: hou2 aa3 maa4 maa4
cards.english: Okay, Grandma

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: je4 je2 nei5 hou2
cards.english: Grandpa, hello

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: je4 je2 hou2
cards.english: Grandpa, hello

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 hou2 maa1
cards.english: Peppa, George, how are you?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: ni1 dou6 hai6 zyu1 je4 je4 ge3 coi3 jyun4
cards.english: This is Grandpa Pig's vegetable garden

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.characters: 呢度所有嘅菜都係佢自己種㗎
cards.jyutping: ni1 dou6 so2 jau5 ge3 coi3 dou1 hai6 keoi5 zi6 gei2 zung2 gaa4
cards.english: He grows all the vegetables here himself

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 hai6 me1 lai4 gaa4
cards.english: What is that?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: hung2 lung4
cards.english: Dinosaur

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: jyun4 loi4 hai6 hung2 lung4 aa1
cards.english: Oh, it's a dinosaur?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.characters: 我哋而家去摘午餐要食嘅菜啦
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 ji4 gaa1 heoi3 zaak6 ng5 caan1 jiu3 sik6 ge3 coi3 laa1
cards.english: Let's go pick some vegetables for lunch now.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: nei5 soeng2 sik6 faan1 ke2 maa1
cards.english: Peppa, do you want to eat tomatoes?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: soeng2 sik6 aa3 je4 je2
cards.english: I want to eat them, Grandpa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: nei5 soeng2 sik6 faan1 ke2 maa1
cards.english: George, do you want to eat tomatoes?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: m4 soeng2
cards.english: Don't want to.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 m4 zung1 ji3 sik6 faan1 ke2 gaa4
cards.english: George doesn't like to eat tomatoes.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: m4 hai6 gwaa3
cards.english: Really?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 soeng2 sik6 saang1 coi3 maa1
cards.english: Do you want to eat lettuce?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: soeng2 sik6 aa3 je4 je2
cards.english: I want to eat it, Grandpa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: m4 soeng2
cards.english: Don't want to.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 m4 zung1 ji3 sik6 saang1 coi3 gaa4
cards.english: George doesn't like eating lettuce.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: m4 hai6 gwaa3
cards.english: Really?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.characters: 係噉我要揾啲George鍾意食嘅嘢啦
cards.jyutping: hai6 gam2 ngo5 jiu3 wan2 di1 zung1 ji3 sik6 ge3 je5 laa1
cards.english: In that case, I need to find something that George likes to eat.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: nei5 zung1 ji3 sik6 ceng1 gwaa1 maa1
cards.english: Do you like to eat cucumber?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: m4 zung1 ji3 sik6 cing1 gwaa1
cards.english: George doesn't like to eat cucumber.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.characters: 亦都唔鍾意食生菜同埋唔鍾意食蕃茄
cards.jyutping: jik6 dou1 m4 zung1 ji3 sik6 saang1 coi3 tung4 maai4 m4 zung1 ji3 sik6 faan1 ke2
cards.english: Also doesn't like to eat lettuce, and doesn't like to eat tomato.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.characters: George係噉，你鍾意食啲咩蔬菜啊？
cards.jyutping: hai6 gam2 nei5 zung1 ji3 sik6 di1 me1 so1 coi3 aa3
cards.english: George, what vegetables do you like to eat?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: zyu1 gu1 lik1 daan6 gou1
cards.english: Chocolate cake!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: zan1 hai6 so4 aa3
cards.english: George is really silly!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.characters: 朱古力蛋糕唔係蔬菜嚟㗎
cards.jyutping: zyu1 gu1 lik1 daan6 gou1 m4 hai6 so1 coi3 lai4 gaa4
cards.english: Chocolate cake is not a vegetable.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.characters: 可能將啲蔬菜整成沙律之後
cards.jyutping: ho2 nang4 zoeng1 di1 so1 coi3 zing2 sing4 saa1 leot6 zi1 hau6
cards.english: Maybe after we make the vegetables into a salad,

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 zau6 wui6 zung1 ji3 sik6 gaa4 laa3
cards.english: George will like to eat it.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.characters: 係好新鮮嘅蕃茄、生菜同青瓜啊
cards.jyutping: hai6 hou2 san1 sin1 ge3 faan1 ke2 saang1 coi3 tung4 cing1 gwaa1 aa3
cards.english: They are very fresh tomatoes, lettuce and cucumbers.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: sau2 sin1 jiu3 sai2 gon1 zeng6 keoi5 dei6
cards.english: First, we need to wash them clean.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: tung4 bong1 zyu1 maa4 maa4 sai2 coi3
cards.english: Peppa and George are helping Grandma Pig wash vegetables.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 nam2 ji5 ging1 sai2 gon1 zeng6 laa3
cards.english: I think they are clean now.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.characters: 豬嫲嫲將啲蕃茄、生菜同埋青瓜整成沙律
cards.jyutping: zyu1 maa4 maa4 zoeng1 di1 faan1 ke2 saang1 coi3 tung4 maai4 ceng1 gwaa1 zing2 sing4 saa1 leot6
cards.english: Grandma Pig made the tomatoes, lettuce, and cucumbers into a salad.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.characters: 爺爺呀，你叫大家嚟食嘢啦
cards.jyutping: je4 je2 aa1 nei5 giu3 daai6 gaa1 lai4 sik6 je5 laa1
cards.english: Grandpa, can you call everyone to eat?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: sik6 je5 laa3
cards.english: Time to eat!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.characters: 豬嫲嫲整咗薄餅做午餐
cards.jyutping: zyu1 maa4 maa4 zing2 zo2 bok6 beng2 zou6 ng5 caan1
cards.english: Grandma Pig made pancakes for lunch.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: ni1 dou6 jau5 di1 saa1 leot6
cards.english: There's some salad here.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.characters: 係用爺爺嘅蕃茄、生菜同青瓜整成㗎
cards.jyutping: hai6 jung6 je4 je4 ge3 faan1 ke2 saang1 coi3 tung4 ceng1 gwaa1 zing2 sing4 gaa4
cards.english: It's made with Grandpa's tomatoes, lettuce, and cucumbers.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: daai6 gaa1 jat1 cai4 sik6 je5 laa1
cards.english: Everyone, let's eat!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: sik6 zo2 keoi5 faai3 bok6 beng2
cards.english: George ate his pancake.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.characters: 但係George唔鍾意食蕃茄、生菜同埋青瓜
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 m4 zung1 ji3 sik6 faan1 ke2 saang1 coi3 tung4 maai4 ceng1 gwaa1
cards.english: But George doesn't like tomatoes, lettuce, or cucumbers.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: zou6 me1 si6 aa3
cards.english: What's wrong, George?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: nei5 m4 zung1 ji3 sik6 saa1 leot6 gaa4 me1
cards.english: You don't like salad?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: m4 soeng2
cards.english: Don't want to.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.characters: George，你乖乖地試下食一啖蕃茄咁多吖
cards.jyutping: nei5 gwaai1 gwaai1 dei6 si3 haa6 sik6 jat1 daam6 faan1 ke2 gam3 do1 aa1
cards.english: George, be good and try just one bite of tomato.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: ne1 jat1 gau6 hai6 cing1 gwaa1 lai4 gaa4
cards.english: George, this piece here is cucumber.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.characters: 係爺爺喺花園度種㗎喎
cards.jyutping: hai6 je4 je2 hai2 faa1 jyun4 dou6 zung2 gaa4 wo3
cards.english: Grandpa grew it in the garden.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: bat1 jyu4 si3 siu2 siu2 saang1 coi3 aa3
cards.english: How about trying a little lettuce, George?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: hou2 hou2 mei6 gaa4
cards.english: It's very delicious.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: juk1 gwaai1 laa1 m4 hou2 haam3 laa1
cards.english: Oh, be a good boy, don't cry, George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: nei5 ji4 gaa1 mong6 zyu6 laa3 wo3
cards.english: You're looking at it now!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: ji4 gaa1 keoi5 hai6 zek3 hung2 lung4 aa3
cards.english: Now it's a dinosaur.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: hung2 lung4
cards.english: Dinosaur!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: hou2 zung1 ji3 hung2 lung4
cards.english: George likes dinosaurs a lot.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.characters: George而家喺度食緊蕃茄、生菜同埋青瓜
cards.jyutping: ji4 gaa1 hai2 dou6 sik6 gan2 faan1 ke2 saang1 coi3 tung4 maai4 ceng1 gwaa1
cards.english: George is now eating tomatoes, lettuce, and cucumbers.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: nei5 hou2 lek1 zai2 aa3
cards.english: You're so clever, George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: nei5 soeng2 sik6 do1 di1 maa1
cards.english: Do you want to eat more, George?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: baau2
cards.english: -Full. -George

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.characters: 你係咪覺得太飽，所以已經 食唔落蕃茄、生菜同埋青瓜啊？
cards.jyutping: nei5 hai6 mai6 gok3 dak1 taai3 baau2 so2 ji5 ji5 ging1 sik6 m4 lok6 faan1 ke2 saang1 coi3 tung4 maai4 ceng1 gwaa1 aa3
cards.english: Do you feel too full, so you can't eat any more tomatoes, lettuce and cucumber?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.characters: George覺得好飽，食唔落沙律喇
cards.jyutping: gok3 dak1 hou2 baau2 sik6 m4 lok6 saa1 leot6 laa3
cards.english: George feels very full and can't eat any more salad.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.characters: George，你真係飽到食唔落任何嘢呀？
cards.jyutping: nei5 zan1 hai6 baau2 dou3 sik6 m4 lok6 jam6 ho4 je5 aa1
cards.english: George, are you really so full that you can't eat anything at all?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.characters: George覺得好飽，食唔落任何嘢喇
cards.jyutping: gok3 dak1 hou2 baau2 sik6 m4 lok6 jam6 ho4 je5 laa3
cards.english: George feels very full and can't eat anything at all.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: juk1 hai6 aa1
cards.english: Oh, really?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.characters: 噉即係你都食唔落呢個朱古力蛋糕啦？
cards.jyutping: gam2 zik1 hai6 nei5 dou1 sik6 m4 lok6 ni1 go3 zyu1 gu1 lik1 daan6 gou1 laa1
cards.english: So that means you can't eat this chocolate cake either?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: zyu1 gu1 lik1 daan6 gou1
cards.english: Chocolate cake!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.jyutping: sai1 lei6 aa3
cards.english: Amazing!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E34 Lunch［午餐］
cards.characters: 睇嚟George嘅食慾已經返返晒嚟啦
cards.jyutping: tai2 lai4 ge3 sik6 juk6 ji5 ging1 faan1 faan1 saai3 lai4 laa1
cards.english: Looks like George's appetite is back!

to think that ...; to feel that ...
particle indicating that a previously asked question is to be applied to the preceding word ("What about ...?", "And ...?")
particle for inquiring about location ("Where is ...?")
particle signaling a pause, to emphasize the preceding words and allow the listener time to take them on board ("ok?", "are you with me?")

(sentence-final particle) used in questions to link back to prior discourse or context ("what about...?", "and...?")

(discourse particle) used to mark a slight pause or emphasis in speech

to go to one's school or office
to resume an interrupted action (when placed after a verb)
